title: [fixture] Streams page — spacing between stream count and Bulk Delete button is too tight
body: ### Bug Description On the Streams page, the horizontal spacing between the stream-count text (e.g. `50 streams`) and the **Bulk Delete** button is visibly too small. The two elements appear to touch or nearly touch, giving a cramped look. ### Priority P3 - Low ### Severity Minor ### Steps to Reproduce (Optional) _No response_ ### Which OpenObserve Functionalities Are Affected? - [x] Streams - [x] Cosmetic (Synthetic fixture — the repro is ENTIRELY in the attached screenshot. This exercises the vision preprocessor + Analyst reading `bug--attachments.md`. Expected outcome: vision preprocessor produces a non-empty description of the streams-page screenshot; Analyst extracts `area: Streams`, uses the image description to populate reproduction_steps or note `has_visual_repro: true`; testability >= MEDIUM instead of SKIP.)
